signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2%, Exceeding Central Bank Target | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in the previous two months but falling short of market forecasts of 2.4%[1]. This marks a significant development as inflation has moved above the Bank of Korea's 2% target, driven largely by surging oil costs relate
